summary_en: 500,000 shares (7.45% of shares outstanding) – ¥700M upper limit – open-market purchase on TSE – execution window 16-Feb-2026 to 31-Jan-2027. Expansion and extension from prior 16-Feb-2026 to 31-Aug-2026 resolution (200,000 shares, ¥280M). As of 30-Apr-2026, 186,900 shares acquired for ¥134.9M under prior authorization.
title_en: Notice of Partial Modification of Treasury Stock Acquisition Terms (Expansion of Acquisition Limit and Extension of Acquisition Period)
translation_en_brief: LaKeel, Inc. announced on 15 May 2026 an expansion and extension of its treasury stock acquisition program. The company's board resolved to increase the share purchase limit from 200,000 shares (2.89% of outstanding shares) to 500,000 shares (7.45%), and to raise the yen ceiling from ¥280M to ¥700M. The acquisition window is extended from 31 August 2026 to 31 January 2027, maintaining the 16 February 2026 start date. All purchases will be conducted on the Tokyo Stock Exchange through open-market transactions. The stated rationale is to enable flexible capital management in response to changing business conditions, while returning value to shareholders and enhancing capital efficiency. As of 30 April 2026, the company had already acquired 186,900 shares for ¥134.9M under the original authorization.
